name: Coconut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the toasted coconut, flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg, oil, milk, and vanilla.
4. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
5. Grease and flour a loaf pan.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pan.
7. Bake for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the bread comes out clean.
